CreateMarketplaceRevenueShare.name: CreateMarketplaceRevenueShare
CreateMarketplaceRevenueShare.documentation: Creates a new marketplace revenue share resource in the specified catalog.

CreateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation.name: CreateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation
CreateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation.documentation: Creates a new marketplace revenue share allocation for the specified product.

CreateRevenueAttribution.name: CreateRevenueAttribution
CreateRevenueAttribution.documentation: Creates a new revenue attribution record in the specified catalog.

GetMarketplaceRevenueShare.name: GetMarketplaceRevenueShare
GetMarketplaceRevenueShare.documentation: Retrieves the details of a specific marketplace revenue share.

GetMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation.name: GetMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation
GetMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation.documentation: Retrieves the details of a specific marketplace revenue share allocation.

GetRevenueAttribution.name: GetRevenueAttribution
GetRevenueAttribution.documentation: Retrieves the details of a specific revenue attribution.

GetRevenueAttributionAllocation.name: GetRevenueAttributionAllocation
GetRevenueAttributionAllocation.documentation: Retrieves a single allocation by its RevenueAttributionAllocationId. Supports optional point-in-time version queries.

GetRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask.name: GetRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask
GetRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask.documentation: Retrieves the current status of a previously submitted allocations task. When COMPLETE, includes the latest revision. When FAILED, includes error details.

ListMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocations.name: ListMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocations
ListMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocations.documentation: Returns a paginated list of allocations under a marketplace revenue share, with optional filtering by status and effective date range. Supports historical reads at a specific share revision.

ListMarketplaceRevenueShares.name: ListMarketplaceRevenueShares
ListMarketplaceRevenueShares.documentation: Returns a paginated list of marketplace revenue shares with optional filters.

ListRevenueAttributionAllocations.name: ListRevenueAttributionAllocations
ListRevenueAttributionAllocations.documentation: Returns a paginated list of committed allocations with support for filtering by entity, customer, status, or date range.

ListRevenueAttributions.name: ListRevenueAttributions
ListRevenueAttributions.documentation: Returns a paginated list of revenue attributions with optional filters.

ListTagsForResource.name: ListTagsForResource
ListTagsForResource.documentation: Returns the tags associated with the specified resource.

StartRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask.name: StartRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask
StartRevenueAttributionAllocationsTask.documentation: Submits a batch of up to 250 allocation changes (CREATE and/or UPDATE) for asynchronous processing. Returns a TaskId for tracking.

TagResource.name: TagResource
TagResource.documentation: Adds or overwrites one or more tags for the specified resource.

UntagResource.name: UntagResource
UntagResource.documentation: Removes one or more tags from the specified resource.

UpdateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation.name: UpdateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation
UpdateMarketplaceRevenueShareAllocation.documentation: Updates an existing marketplace revenue share allocation. Supports modifying effective dates, revenue share percentage, and status with time-based mutability rules.

AccessDeniedException.documentation: The request was denied due to insufficient permissions.

Arn.documentation: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the revenue attribution.

Id.documentation: The unique identifier of the revenue attribution.

Catalog.documentation: The catalog that the revenue attribution belongs to.

Name.documentation: The display name of the revenue attribution.

TenancyModel.documentation: The tenancy model for this revenue attribution.

MarketplaceProduct.documentation: The AWS Marketplace product attributes associated with this attribution, if set.

CreatedDate.documentation: The date when the revenue attribution was created.

LastModifiedDate.documentation: The date when the revenue attribution was last modified.

LatestRevision.documentation: The latest revision of the revenue attribution resource.

EffectiveFrom.documentation: The date from which this revenue attribution is effective, derived from the earliest allocation start date (YYYY-MM-DD).

EffectiveUntil.documentation: The date until which this revenue attribution is effective, derived from the latest allocation end date (YYYY-MM-DD).

TotalActiveRevenueAttributionAllocationC.documentation: The total number of allocations under this revenue attribution whose Status is ACTIVE.

TotalRevenueAttributionAllocationCount.documentation: The total number of allocations under this revenue attribution, counting both ACTIVE and INACTIVE.

AttributionSummary.documentation: Summary representation of a revenue attribution returned in list operations.

ConflictException.documentation: The request could not be completed due to a conflict with the current state of the resource.

ProductId.documentation: The AWS Marketplace product identifier for the parent revenue share.

ClientToken.documentation: A unique token to ensure idempotency of the create request.

EffectiveFrom.documentation: The effective start date for the allocation. Must be the first day of a month.

EffectiveUntil.documentation: The effective end date for the allocation. Must be the last day of a month (YYYY-MM-DD). Omit for open-ended allocations.

RevenueSharePercent.documentation: The revenue share percentage for this allocation.

MarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationId.documentation: The unique identifier of the newly created allocation.

ProductName.documentation: The display name of the AWS Marketplace product.

tags.documentation: The tags to add to the resource.

ProductId.documentation: The AWS Marketplace product identifier for the parent revenue share.

MarketplaceRevenueShareAllocationId.documentation: The identifier of the allocation to update.

MarketplaceRevenueShareRevision.documentation: The current revision of the parent share. Must match for optimistic concurrency control.

ClientToken.documentation: A unique token to ensure idempotency of the update request.

EffectiveFrom.documentation: The new effective start date. Must be the first day of a month. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.

EffectiveUntil.documentation: The new effective end date. Must be the last day of a month and on or after today.

RevenueSharePercent.documentation: The new revenue share percentage. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.

Status.documentation: The new status. Set to INACTIVE for soft-delete. Only modifiable on future-dated allocations.

Description.documentation: The updated description of the revenue attribution.

FieldList.documentation: A list of fields that failed validation.

ValidationException.documentation: The request failed validation due to invalid input parameters.

Name.documentation: The name of the field that failed validation.

Message.documentation: A human-readable message describing why the field validation failed.

Code.documentation: The specific validation error code indicating the type of validation failure.

ValidationExceptionField.documentation: Details about a specific field that failed validation.

documentation: AWS Partner Central Revenue Measurement API for creating, managing, and tracking revenue attributions and their allocations with deal entities such as offers and opportunities.
